docs.title: Ontology for ITS Location Referencing
docs.text:
Unknown description

This ontology consists of the following patterns:

  • Location Pattern (itsLocation)

The ontology also contains the following classes that are not assigned to any pattern:

  • Location Pattern (itsLocation)

The formal definition of these patterns is available in TTL Syntax.

docs.title: OpenLR Ontology
docs.text:
Unknown description

This ontology consists of the following patterns:

The ontology also contains the following classes that are not assigned to any pattern:

  • Circle Location Reference (OpenLR)
  • Closed Line Location Reference (OpenLR)
  • Coordinates (OpenLR)
  • Form Of Way (OpenLR)
  • Functional Road Class (OpenLR)
  • Geo Coordinate Location Reference (OpenLR)
  • Grid Location Reference (OpenLR)
  • Line Attributes (OpenLR)
  • Line Location Reference (OpenLR)
  • Location Reference (OpenLR)
  • Location Reference Point (OpenLR)
  • Open LR Thing (OpenLR)
  • Orientation (OpenLR)
  • Path Attributes (OpenLR)
  • Point Along Line Location Reference (OpenLR)
  • Poi With Access Point Location Reference (OpenLR)
  • Polygon Location Reference (OpenLR)
  • Rectangle Location Reference (OpenLR)
  • Side Of Road (OpenLR)

The formal definition of these patterns is available in TTL Syntax.

docs.title: Formalization for CircleLocationReference
docs.text: Property Constraint hasCenter exactly 1 owl::Thing radius exactly 1 owl::Thing subClassOf LocationReference

docs.title: Formalization for Coordinates
docs.text: Property Constraint latitude exactly 1 owl::Thing longitude exactly 1 owl::Thing subClassOf OpenLRThing

docs.title: Formalization for GeoCoordinateLocationReference
docs.text: Property Constraint hasCoordinates exactly 1 owl::Thing subClassOf LocationReference

docs.title: Formalization for GridLocationReference
docs.text: Property Constraint numColumns exactly 1 owl::Thing numRows exactly 1 owl::Thing subClassOf RectangleLocationReference

docs.title: Formalization for LineAttributes
docs.text: Property Constraint bearing exactly 1 owl::Thing hasFOW exactly 1 owl::Thing hasFRC exactly 1 owl::Thing subClassOf OpenLRThing

docs.title: Specializations of LineLocationReference
docs.text: Class Description Closed Line Location Reference (OpenLR)

docs.title: Formalization for LineLocationReference
docs.text: Property Constraint hasLRP min 2 owl::Thing negativeOffset max 1 owl::Thing positiveOffset max 1 owl::Thing subClassOf LocationReference

docs.title: Specializations of LocationReference
docs.text: Class Description Circle Location Reference (OpenLR) Closed Line Location Reference (OpenLR) Geo Coordinate Location Reference (OpenLR) Grid Location Reference (OpenLR) Line Location Reference (OpenLR) Point Along Line Location Reference (OpenLR) Poi With Access Point Location Reference (OpenLR) Polygon Location Reference (OpenLR) Rectangle Location Reference (OpenLR)

docs.title: Formalization for LocationReference
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf OpenLRThing version exactly 1 owl::Thing

docs.title: Formalization for LocationReferencePoint
docs.text: Property Constraint hasCoordinates exactly 1 owl::Thing hasLineAttributes exactly 1 owl::Thing hasPathAttributes max 1 owl::Thing subClassOf OpenLRThing

docs.title: Specializations of OpenLRThing
docs.text: Class Description Circle Location Reference (OpenLR) Closed Line Location Reference (OpenLR) Coordinates (OpenLR) Form Of Way (OpenLR) Functional Road Class (OpenLR) Geo Coordinate Location Reference (OpenLR) Grid Location Reference (OpenLR) Line Attributes (OpenLR) Line Location Reference (OpenLR) Location Reference (OpenLR) Location Reference Point (OpenLR) Orientation (OpenLR) Path Attributes (OpenLR) Point Along Line Location Reference (OpenLR) Poi With Access Point Location Reference (OpenLR) Polygon Location Reference (OpenLR) Rectangle Location Reference (OpenLR) Side Of Road (OpenLR)

docs.title: Formalization for PathAttributes
docs.text: Property Constraint distanceToNext exactly 1 owl::Thing hasLowestFRCToNext exactly 1 owl::Thing subClassOf OpenLRThing

docs.title: Formalization for PoiWithAccessPointLocationReference
docs.text: Property Constraint hasLRP exactly 2 owl::Thing hasOrientation max 1 owl::Thing hasPOICoordinates exactly 1 owl::Thing hasSideOfRoad max 1 owl::Thing positiveOffset exactly 1 owl::Thing subClassOf LocationReference

docs.title: Formalization for PointAlongLineLocationReference
docs.text: Property Constraint hasLRP exactly 2 owl::Thing hasOrientation max 1 owl::Thing hasSideOfRoad max 1 owl::Thing positiveOffset exactly 1 owl::Thing subClassOf LocationReference

docs.title: Formalization for PolygonLocationReference
docs.text: Property Constraint hasCorner min 3 owl::Thing subClassOf LocationReference

docs.title: Formalization for RectangleLocationReference
docs.text: Property Constraint hasLowerLeft exactly 1 owl::Thing hasUpperRight exactly 1 owl::Thing subClassOf LocationReference

docs.title: Formalization for AreaDestination
docs.text: Property Constraint areaLocation exactly 1 owl::Thing subClassOf Destination

docs.title: Formalization for AreaLocation
docs.text: Property Constraint areasAtWhichApplicable all code::Code areasAtWhichApplicable max 1 owl::Thing subClassOf Location

docs.title: Specializations of Destination
docs.text: Class Description Area Destination Point Destination

docs.title: Formalization for IndexedLocation
docs.text: Property Constraint index all xsd::integer index exactly 1 owl::Thing location all Location location exactly 1 owl::Thing subClassOf LocationReference

docs.text: Property Constraint routeDestination all Destination subClassOf LocationReference

docs.title: Formalization for ItineraryByIndexedLocations
docs.text: Property Constraint locationContainedInItinerary all IndexedLocation subClassOf Itinerary

docs.text: Class Description Area Location Linear Location Network Location Point Location

docs.title: Formalization for Location
docs.text: Property Constraint coordinatesForDisplay all PointCoordinates coordinatesForDisplay max 1 owl::Thing externalLocationReference all code::Code subClassOf LocationReference

docs.text: Class Property Indexed Location location Location Group By List locationContainedInGroup

docs.text: Class Description Location Group By List

docs.title: Formalization for LocationGroupByList
docs.text: Property Constraint locationContainedInGroup all Location locationContainedInGroup min 2 owl::Thing subClassOf LocationGroup

docs.title: Location Pattern
docs.text:
It consists of the following classes:

  • Area Destination
  • Area Location
  • Destination
  • Indexed Location
  • Itinerary
  • Itinerary By Indexed Locations
  • Jurisdictional Entity
  • Linear Location
  • Location
  • Location Group
  • Location Group By List
  • Location Reference (itsLocation)
  • Location Thing
  • Named Area
  • Network Location
  • Point Coordinates
  • Point Destination
  • Point Location
  • Position Confidence Ellipse
  • Supplementary Positional Description

docs.title: Specializations of LocationReference
docs.text: Class Description Area Location Indexed Location Itinerary Itinerary By Indexed Locations Linear Location Location Location Group Location Group By List Network Location Point Location

docs.title: Specializations of LocationThing
docs.text: Class Description Area Destination Area Location Destination Indexed Location Itinerary Itinerary By Indexed Locations Jurisdictional Entity Linear Location Location Location Group Location Group By List Location Reference (itsLocation) Named Area Network Location Point Coordinates Point Destination Point Location Position Confidence Ellipse Supplementary Positional Description

docs.title: Specializations of NetworkLocation
docs.text: Class Description Linear Location Point Location

docs.title: Formalization for NetworkLocation
docs.text: Property Constraint destination max 1 owl::Thing positionalDescription all SupplementaryPositionalDescription positionalDescription max 1 owl::Thing subClassOf Location

docs.title: Formalization for PointCoordinates
docs.text: Property Constraint elevation all xsd::float elevation max 1 owl::Thing genProp::hasIdentifier all xsd::string genProp::hasIdentifier max 1 owl::Thing latitude all xsd::float latitude exactly 1 owl::Thing longitude all xsd::float longitude exactly 1 owl::Thing positionConfidence all PositionConfidenceEllipse positionConfidence max 1 owl::Thing subClassOf LocationThing

docs.title: Formalization for PointDestination
docs.text: Property Constraint pointLocation all PointLocation pointLocation exactly 1 owl::Thing subClassOf Destination

docs.title: Formalization for SupplementaryPositionalDescription
docs.text: Property Constraint directionPurpose all code::Code directionPurpose max 1 owl::Thing geographicDescriptor all code::Code geographicDescriptor max 1 owl::Thing infrastructureDescriptor all code::Code infrastructureDescriptor max 1 owl::Thing lengthAffected all cityunits::Length lengthAffected max 1 owl::Thing locationDescription all xsd::string locationDescription max 1 owl::Thing locationPrecision all cityunits::Length locationPrecision max 1 owl::Thing positionOnCarriageway all code::Code positionOnCarriageway max 1 owl::Thing sequentialRampNumber all xsd::integer sequentialRampNumber max 1 owl::Thing subClassOf LocationThing
